title: selaginella marahuacae
intro: Selaginella marahuacae, also known as the Marahuacae spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the genus Selaginella, a group of small, non-vascular plants that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Selaginella marahuacae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Selaginella marahuacae is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
